# Grabby

Grabby is a distributed web content capture system that converts any webpage into clean Markdown using a Chrome extension and backend server. It supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) for AI agent integration.

## Pages
- Home: https://grabby.eztoolab.com/
- Setup Guide: https://grabby.eztoolab.com/setup
- API Reference: https://grabby.eztoolab.com/api

## Key Features
- Extract any webpage to Markdown via real browser rendering
- Full-page screenshots
- MCP protocol support for AI agents
- Dual backend (Python FastAPI / Go)
- Automatic tab management
